title: Geo Defense
description:
About This GameGeometry Defense is a minimalist geometric action shooter.

Face waves of constantly appearing geometric enemies and control your unit to survive against increasingly dangerous attacks. Defeating enemies allows you to collect resources, strengthen yourself, and unlock powerful upgrades.

As the game progresses, enemy numbers, movement speed, and attack patterns will continue to change. You will need to choose different upgrade paths based on the situation, combine various abilities, and gradually build your own unique combat style.

The core experience of the game focuses on simple controls, rapid progression, and continuous challenges. Every run offers new choices, allowing you to experiment with different upgrade combinations and discover the playstyle that suits you best.

Whether you enjoy chasing high scores or simply want a quick and relaxing combat experience, Geometry Defense aims to provide a simple and satisfying gameplay experience.

FeaturesEasy-to-Learn ControlsNo complicated tutorials or mechanics are required. Jump straight into the action and focus on movement, shooting, and upgrading.

Progressive Upgrade SystemCollect resources through combat and choose different upgrade paths to gradually increase your power.

Increasing Enemy ChallengesAs time passes, enemies become more numerous and dangerous, testing your reactions and strategic decisions.

Clean Geometric Visual StyleThe game features a clear and vibrant geometric art style, focusing on satisfying combat feedback and gameplay experience.
description_short: Geometry Defense is a fast-paced geometric shooter where every level brings a new choice. Choose from random upgrade gates, combine powerful abilities, and evolve your strategy as enemies grow stronger. Experience simple controls, endless combinations, and satisfying progression.
